items.title: EcoFlow flash sale drops a 1,024Wh DELTA 3 Classic power station + 25K power bank bundle to $417 ($322 off), more
items.summary: As part of its final day of Early Prime Sale savings, which coincides with Amazon’s direct Prime Day event, EcoFlow has launched another flash sale window with up to 52% discounts across four units. One standout bundle gives you the 1,024Wh DELTA 3 Classic Portable Power Station with a FREE RAPID 170W 25,000mAh power bank at $417.05 shipped, after using the code 26EFPDAFF at checkout, which beats out the standalone station at Amazon by $22 ($162 without factoring in the free power bank). The power station is dropping down from a full price of $599 directly, which would cost you around $739 if you were also grabbing the power bank with it. While we have seen the price go a little lower in the past, you’re getting a combined $322 savings (station + power bank), with this being the best price for the station that we’ve seen since March’s Big Spring Sale. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals while they last.

items.title: Intel-certified Thunderbolt 5 cable with 240W charging and up to 120Gb/s transfers drops to $23
items.summary:
Stouchi Certified Thunderbolt 5 240W USB-C Cable

Buy for $23 (Reg. $31.50)

What we love

While we occasionally spot USB-C cables for only a couple of bucks each, at that price point they often top out at 60W charging speeds and have abysmally slow USB 2.0 data transfer speeds. This Intel-certified Thunderbolt 5 solution reaches up to 240W and sports sustained 80Gb/s transfers that can peak as high as 120Gb/s.

items.title: This 6-inch 8-in-1 USB-C extender won’t obstruct outlets and it’s only $8 (Save 50%)
items.summary:
TROND 8-in-1 6-inch USB-C Outlet Extender

Buy for $8 (Reg. $16)

What we love

A lot of outlet extenders plug directly into an outlet and can obstruct the other. This unit takes a different approach with a 6-inch cable that gets it away from the other so you don’t have to forfeit any of your options. It turns a single outlet into 8 power sources, including 4 AC, two Type-C, and a couple of USB-A ports.
